summary: Comprehensive logic, tab navigation, and API connection fix for ClawTask dashboard. All 32 checklist items reviewed. 16 concrete fixes applied.

fixes.issue: Parsed d.files but spec returns {ok, prompts:{key:{path,size,...}}}
fixes.action: Rewrote response parsing to convert Object.entries(d.prompts) into array with key/name/path/size/department fields

fixes.issue: Used 'path' parameter but spec key is 'key'; missing r.ok check
fixes.action: Renamed parameter to 'key', added if(!r.ok) throw, added notify() on error

fixes.issue: POST body used {path:...} but spec requires {key:...}
POST body used {agent:...} but spec requires {agent_id:...}
Read d.output but spec returns {ok, stdout, stderr, returncode}
fixes.action: Changed to read d.stdout || d.output; added separate stderr display in red; show returncode when no output

fixes.issue: Sent agent=all but spec requires empty string for no filter
fixes.action: Added filter = rawFilter === 'all' ? '' : rawFilter; added loading state

fixes.issue: Wrong MQ count field — spec returns {ok, queue:[...], count}
fixes.action: Added d.count !== undefined check with fallback to queue.length

fixes.issue: Missing ?n=50 query param per spec; missing r.ok check
fixes.action: Added ?n=50, added r.ok check, added notify() on error

fixes.issue: Did not merge API data with AGENTS_EXTENDED; no loading state; no error handling
fixes.action: Complete rewrite — merges /api/agents response with static data for color/role/skill; adds loading state; adds notify() on error

fixes.issue: Missing heartbeat display and current_task from API response
fixes.action: Added last_heartbeat relative time display and current_task field rendering

fixes.issue: New tasks never POSTed to /api/tasks/add; only saved to localStorage
fixes.action: Added POST /api/tasks/add call; syncs server-assigned id back to local array

fixes.issue: No loading state; no error notifications on API failure
fixes.action: Added tbody loading state, notify() on HTTP errors, notify() on catch, AbortSignal.timeout(5000)

fixes.issue: Status changes only updated localStorage; never synced to API
fixes.action: Added POST /api/tasks/{id}/status with {status, progress} after localStorage update

fixes.issue: Catch block silently swallowed API errors — UI showed stale data with no indication
fixes.action: Added notify('LLM status unavailable — showing cached data') in catch block

fixes.issue: Catch block silently fell back to SVC_STATIC with no user feedback
fixes.action: Added notify('Services API offline — showing cached state') in catch block

fixes.issue: Catch block showed static fallback with no error notification
fixes.action: Added notify('Knowledge API offline — showing static index') in catch block

checklist_status.tab_system: VERIFIED — showView() correctly toggles ctrl-panel display:flex/none; nav active class applied
checklist_status.api_connection: FIXED — all response field mismatches corrected (stdout/output, agent_id/agent, key/path, prompts obj/files arr)
checklist_status.data_flow: FIXED — kanban add/drag-drop now syncs to API; task ID synced from server response
checklist_status.kanban_board: FIXED — drag-drop POSTs status update; modal creates tasks via API
checklist_status.missing_connections: FIXED — loadTelemetry filter, svcShowLog n=50, loadSubagents count field
checklist_status.kanban_panel: OK — renderBoard functional with local+API sync
checklist_status.status_panel: OK — counts computed from local tasks array in renderBoard()
checklist_status.agents_panel: FIXED — merges API + static data, heartbeat, current_task display
checklist_status.kpi_panel: NO DEDICATED PANEL — KPI data embedded in status bar widgets
checklist_status.prompts_panel: FIXED — response parsing, key field, save body
checklist_status.terminal_panel: FIXED — stdout/stderr split display, returncode shown
checklist_status.clarifications_panel: NOT FOUND — no panel in HTML; may be handled by ACP console
